title: Intermediate variables for function calls + expression coverage

features.name: automatic function returning bit with bitwise NOT
features.description: Code should include a function with automatic lifetime that returns a scalar bit type and performs a bitwise NOT operation

features.name: automatic function with unary operator in expression coverage context
features.description: Code should include an automatic function with a unary bitwise operator used in an expression coverage context where coverage instrumentation interferes with purity detection
